title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Structure Brief: Scale Validation
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa scale validation increment in a defended multi-structure dispatch system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test realistic, boundary, and adversarial workloads against analytical predictions.
Present loop invariants, induction, or contradiction arguments appropriate to each component.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
